title: Tavern & Table
description: Tavern & Table is a cozy medieval-style mod that adds pies, stews, porridge, and sweets to Minecraft. Cook hearty meals from familiar ingredients and feast like you’re in a tavern!
body:
**Tavern & Table** is a Minecraft 1.12.2 mod inspired by medieval cuisine and cozy tavern life.
It adds a selection of new food items crafted from familiar ingredients — from hearty fish stew and porridge to apple pie and sweet rolls.

Perfect for RPG modpacks, farming gameplay, or anyone looking to enrich their Minecraft meals. Recipes are simple, balanced, and fully compatible with vanilla mechanics.

Features:
 • New medieval-style dishes: pies, porridges, stews, baked goods
 • Recipes made from vanilla ingredients
 • Balanced hunger and saturation values
 • Ideal for immersive and roleplay experiences
 • Compatible with other food mods

Become a tavern keeper in your own Minecraft world — prepare a feast and set the table!
